name: hub_status
description:
Return the active hub's root path and name plus quick stats. Returns an explicit `hub: null` if no hub is reachable. Cheap — call this first when you're unsure whether BridgeMemory is set up here.

Resolution order: (1) walk up from `cwd` for `.bridgememory/`; (2) fall back to the hub the user has open in BridgeSpace's BridgeMemory UI.

cwd.description: Optional. Absolute path used to discover the hub by walking up for `.bridgememory/`. Defaults to the server's process cwd.
